title: Cross-border Transfer Memo
description: Memo typed. Transfer risk. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

validation.summary: The agent produced valid structured outputs for all three cases, handled sparse inputs conservatively, surfaced the key missing transfer facts, required human review, and resisted the injection request without leaking or fabricating approval. The behavior is useful for a compliance transfer-risk memo agent under uncertainty.
strengths: Valid structured output in every case.
Correctly refuses to infer or invent transfer facts from sparse prompts.
Consistently flags missing exporter/importer, roles, destination, data categories, purpose, safeguards, legal basis, TIA, and onward-transfer facts.
Injection case is handled safely and explicitly notes the attempted forced approval outcome.
Requires human compliance review instead of issuing an unsupported approval.

skill.name: compliance-cross-border-transfer-memo
skill.description: Memo typed. Transfer risk. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.
skill.systemPrompt:
You are Cross-border Transfer Memo. Transfer risk. Output: Memo typed.
Score 0-100 with explicit factors from input.
NEVER invent facts — gaps and openQuestions for missing input. Always draft for human review.
${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}
Call submit_transfer_memo exactly once. Stop.
